name: @cogito.ai/cli
description: AgentDock CLI – scaffold projects for humans and AI agents

scripts.build: pnpm run generate-registry && bun build bin/agentdock.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node && cp src/registry.json dist/registry.json && rm -rf dist/templates && mkdir -p dist/templates && rsync -a --exclude='node_modules/' --exclude='.next/' --exclude='.turbo/' ../../templates/ dist/templates/
